headline: Devon And Coterra Merger Reshapes Shale Outlook As Oil Prices Shift
summary: Devon Energy (NYSE:DVN) has agreed to a US$58b all stock merger with Coterra Energy, creating one of the largest U.S. shale producers. The deal combines positions across major U.S. shale basins and is expected to generate substantial operating and cost synergies once completed. At the same time, conflict in the Middle East has pushed oil prices higher, affecting expectations for the merged company’s revenue and capital plans. Devon Energy focuses on U.S. shale production, and the planned...
